flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Edison State Community College fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Edison State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Edison State Community College rose 61% between 2006 and 2009 (21.0% → 33.8%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Edison State Community College rose 24% between 2020 and 2023 (50.7% → 62.9%).
